arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid have won all five of their most recent matches but have made life a little difficult for themselves on occasion. The first Madrid derby of the season takes place on Sunday evening as Atletico Madrid host Real Madrid in La Liga.

arts.ttl: How Atlético Madrid plan to stop Real Madrid: line-up and tactics
arts.sum: Simeone’s planned starting lineup for the derby will feature three changes from the Atlético side that played in Balaídos against Celta Vigo, with De Paul, Rodrigo Riquelme, and Julián Álvarez expected to start. Rodrigo de Paul, who missed the last two matches (Celta and Rayo), is expected to return to the starting lineup, joining Koke and Conor Gallagher in midfield.

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid have rejected Kylian Mbappé’s request to attend Atlético clash
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Real Madrid have requested star attacker Kylian Mbappé not to attend the impending Madrid Derby. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing L’Équipe,…

arts.ttl: Something has changed with Jude Bellingham at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Last season, his first with Madrid, Bellingham scored seven goals in the team’s first nine matches, finishing the campaign with 23 goals and 13 assists. Bellingham, however, was eager to make his mark, seemingly missing the goal-scoring prominence he enjoyed last season.

arts.ttl: Osasuna’s Bryan Zaragoza paid tribute to a Real Madrid star during Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Osasuna star Bryan Zaragoza on Saturday made use of the opportunity to pay tribute to a leading member of the attacking ranks at Real Madrid. This came en route to…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: CB: Eder Militao - The Brazilian is fit again after suffering an injury on international duty with Brazil and has started Madrid's last three La Liga games. GK: Thibaut Courtois - While there's all sorts of hysterics over Barca's goalkeeper situation after Marc-Andre ter Stegen's season-ending injury, Madrid have as safe a custodian between the sticks in Courtois as any team around the world.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid not allowed Kylian Mbappe to attend Atletico Madrid derby showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to the Metropolitano on Sunday for the first Madrid derby of the season. For the showdown fixture, they will be without Kylian Mbappe, who is out for three next three weeks with a thigh injury sustained in the midweek victory against Alaves. Mbappe will instead watch the match from home, although L’Equipe […] The post Real Madrid not allowed Kylian Mbappe to attend Atletico Madrid derby showdown appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Barcelona 'told huge fee is required' to sign highly-rated centre-back
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are reportedly told that a 'huge fee' will be required to sign Brazilian centre-back Murillo from Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Karim Benzema provides his Real Madrid vs Atlético prediction
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Karim Benzema has on Sunday provided his prediction for the upcoming Madrid Derby. The headline fixture of the La Liga weekend is of course set to…

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool's Alexander-Arnold contract decision; Real Madrid target Man Utd star
arts.sum: Chelsea are also one of a number of clubs who were turned down by Barcelona winger Raphinha during the summer transfer window. Real Madrid have been linked with Alexander-Arnold but could instead target Manchester United's Diogo Dalot as an alternative, although the Premier League giants have no desire to let the Portugal international leave.
